productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men White Casual Shoes
description: These numero uno sneakers with sturdy soles, bold overlays and aggressive design highlights is a closet essential. Class up your off-duty ensemble with this sleek referenced sneaker. Wear them with fitted denims and a T-shirt. Throw on a tonal jacket for added style. Upper Textured synthetic leather upper for durability, comfort and style Stitched synthetic overlays for midfoot support Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Synthetic leather tongue for midfoot comfort Printed branding on tongue for style Perforations on the toe for ventilation Midsole PU midsole for lightweight, cushioned comfort Padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with waffle patterned grooves and a raised heel shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
